sections.paragraph:
i.q. שָׂתַם-

(1) to stop up, to obstruct, as fountains, 2Ki 3:19, 25 2Ki 3:25 2Ch 32:3, 2Ch 32:4. (The following roots which begin with an aspirate are kindred to this, חָטַם, חָתַם, חָסַם which see.)

(2) to shut up, to hide, Dan 8:26 12:4 , Dan 12:9. Part. pass. סָתוּם hidden, secret, Eze 28:3.

Niphal, to be stopped up (used of the chinks of a wall), Neh 4:1.

Piel, i.q. Kal signif. 1, Gen 26:15, 18 Gen 26:18.
